hero.designNotes: A minimal yet romantic Gujarati Hindu luxury hero using warm ivory, saffron, vermilion, toran leaves, a restrained rangoli halo, diya glow, and glass-like ceremony panel instead of photography. The asymmetrical editorial typography keeps the first screen premium and modern while honoring Shri Ganesh and family blessings.
hero.html:
Shri Ganeshaya Namah

Kavya & Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

March 22, 2026
Akshar Grand PalaceSomerset, New Jersey
With blessings
K&M

JoyGarba & Baraat
